import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{BrowserRouter as Router,Routes,Route,Navigate}from'react-router-dom';import Layout from'./components/Layout';import Realtime from'./pages/Realtime';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const App=()=>{const[isAuthenticated,setIsAuthenticated]=useState(false);const[isLoading,setIsLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{const checkAuth=async()=>{// 1. Kiểm tra xem có token trong localStorage chưa
const token=localStorage.getItem('access_token');if(token){setIsAuthenticated(true);setIsLoading(false);return;}// 2. Nếu chưa có token, kiểm tra xem trên URL có trả về 'code' không
const searchParams=new URLSearchParams(window.location.search);const code=searchParams.get('code');if(code){try{// Dùng URLSearchParams để định dạng body dạng x-www-form-urlencoded theo chuẩn OAuth2
const tokenEndpoint=`${process.env.REACT_APP_COGNITO_DOMAIN}/oauth2/token`;const bodyParams=new URLSearchParams();bodyParams.append('grant_type','authorization_code');bodyParams.append('client_id',process.env.REACT_APP_CLIENT_ID);bodyParams.append('code',code);bodyParams.append('redirect_uri',process.env.REACT_APP_REDIRECT_URI);const response=await fetch(tokenEndpoint,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'},body:bodyParams});if(response.ok){const data=await response.json();// Lưu token vào máy
localStorage.setItem('access_token',data.access_token);if(data.id_token)localStorage.setItem('id_token',data.id_token);// Dọn dẹp code trên thanh URL 
window.history.replaceState(null,null,window.location.pathname);setIsAuthenticated(true);}else{// Nếu đổi code thất bại (code hết hạn, code giả...), ép đăng nhập lại
window.history.replaceState(null,null,window.location.pathname);redirectToLogin();}}catch(error){console.error("Lỗi mạng khi gọi token endpoint:",error);redirectToLogin();}}else{// 3. Không có token, không có code -> Cognito Hosted UI
redirectToLogin();}setIsLoading(false);};checkAuth();},[]);const redirectToLogin=()=>{// response_type=code
const cognitoUrl=`${process.env.REACT_APP_COGNITO_DOMAIN}/login?client_id=${process.env.REACT_APP_CLIENT_ID}&response_type=code&scope=email+openid+phone&redirect_uri=${process.env.REACT_APP_REDIRECT_URI}`;window.location.href=cognitoUrl;};if(isLoading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{padding:'50px',textAlign:'center'},children:"\u0110ang x\xE1c th\u1EF1c h\u1EC7 th\u1ED1ng..."});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Router,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Layout,{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Routes,{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"/",element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Navigate,{to:"/realtime"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"/realtime",element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Realtime,{})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"/search",element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{padding:20},children:"M\xE0n h\xECnh Tra c\u1EE9u (\u0110ang x\xE2y d\u1EF1ng)"})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Route,{path:"/devices",element:/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{padding:20},children:"M\xE0n h\xECnh Qu\u1EA3n l\xFD thi\u1EBFt b\u1ECB (\u0110ang x\xE2y d\u1EF1ng)"})})]})})});};export default App;
